title: Which Eva character would rock most at video games
display_title: Which Eva character would rock most at video games
wikitext:
[]: Which Eva character would rock most at video games?             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Thu Apr 24, 2008 10:39 pm Seriously, if there was some sort of tournament, who would pwn?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Apr 24, 2008 10:47 pm Asuka, she's a button-masher par excellence.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Thu Apr 24, 2008 10:48 pm Misato no doubt.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Thu Apr 24, 2008 11:02 pm You know, I think she's the only character in the show who ever is shown playing video games that I can remember. Judging by that game disk in the pic, I think Asuka likes fighting games.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Fri Apr 25, 2008 2:35 am Hyuga is a grown kid. He might be a challenger to Asuka...if he actually plays console games.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Apr 25, 2008 10:16 am Depends on the video-game style: RPGs: Shinji, because he'd have the patience to unlock the secret caves, mysteries and stuff and actually to pay attention to the dialogs and see where he has to go next. Fight/Kick ass games: Asuka hands down. The girl has the "'i'm gonna go kick this Mr. Garrison's ass!" in her blood. XDD So yeah. Horror/fighting: Pen-Pen because he is cool like that. Sims: Gendo because he is secretly a lover of these kind of games. XD

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 25, 2008 2:28 pm Based on this one trading card picture I've seen floating around the 'net, I think the REALLY quiet one, Rei, would end up being surprisingly good at it. (Sort of like Ami in Episode 8 of Pretty Solider Sailor Moon.) But I agree Shinji would be great at RPGs while Asuka would be good at fighting games.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Apr 25, 2008 2:30 pm Sachiel, hands down.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Fri Apr 25, 2008 3:59 pm K.T 4 teh win Im officially copyrighting K.T=Kaworu Tabris

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Fri Apr 25, 2008 4:31 pm Gendo would be good at dating games....he's that much of a loser.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Fri Apr 25, 2008 5:09 pm You know, I hear kids born in the 1980's are better at video games on average than kids born in the 90's and later. They grew up with all the classics, like the NES. So according to that logic, Misato, Ritsuko, and Kaji should all be better than any of the pilots.

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Fri Apr 25, 2008 9:59 pm Iron Rooster wrote: You know, I think she's the only character in the show who ever is shown playing video games that I can remember.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sat Apr 26, 2008 2:36 am Has anyone ever mentioned Yui-sama in a Berserker Eva-01?

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Apr 26, 2008 6:22 am Kind of hard to press the A button when your finger is many times larger than the control pad. Asuka would win at fighting games due to the super competative streak in her. Shinji would be her victim. (Probably loose on purpose if he did get close to beating her ever.) Rei would stare at the opposite wall and recite incoherent poetry. Misato would turn it into a drinking game and take a chug every time Asuka won.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sat Apr 26, 2008 12:15 pm This is a surprisingly complex question when you think about it... Misato = driving, or any sort of racing game like Wipeout or Micro Machines. Kaji = Metal Gear, Syphon Filter and the James Bond games in their various incarnations (maybe even something like Dino Crisis or the Jurassic Park game 'cause those had an element of stealth to them). Maya = as long as it isn't violent or icky she'll be fine! Cute platform games like Giana Sisters suit her (maybe that's not the best example 'cause it had those horrible goddamned spiders at the end of some levels). Aoba = Parappa, Vib Ribbon, Rez, DDR, and all those sorts of rhythm games. Hyuga = dating games, where he gets to play out his fantasies surrounding Misato. Gendo = strategy games - things like Civilisation. Real-time strategy games like C&C and to a lesser extent Cannon Fodder perhaps. Hunter21 wrote: Asuka would win at fighting games due to the super competative streak in her.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Apr 26, 2008 12:32 pm The MAGI.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sat Apr 26, 2008 1:10 pm Kensuke would probably pwn at Halo.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Sat Apr 26, 2008 1:15 pm Rei would be good at memorization games.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sat Apr 26, 2008 2:50 pm Zuggy wrote: Ritsuko would just hack any game on the fly and win (unfairly) every single time. My vote goes to Ritsuko.

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Sat Apr 26, 2008 2:53 pm Zuggy wrote: Aoba = Parappa, Vib Ribbon, Rez, DDR, and all those sorts of rhythm games.
